market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Injective files for SEC transfer agent registration to bring securities ownership records onchain
articles.description: The company said the filing would create a regulated pathway for maintaining ownership records for tokenized securities onchain.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: BitPay secures Dutch licensing under MiCA, plans to expand stablecoin payments
articles.description: The Dutch Authority for the Financial Markets approved BitPay’s application as a crypto-asset service provider under the Markets in Crypto-Assets requirements.

articles.title: $1.9 trillion asset manager T. Rowe Price bets on active management with first multi-token crypto ETF
articles.description: T. Rowe Price launched what it says is the industry's first actively managed multi-token spot crypto ETF, offering diversified exposure to digital assets.

articles.title: Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos
articles.description: Google is adding personalized AI avatars to Vids that let users create videos starring a digital version of themselves, alongside Gemini Omni-powered tools for generating and editing videos from prompts and reference images.

articles.title: Roblox launches an AI-powered game-creation feature in its mobile app
articles.description: Roblox's new "Build" feature lets users generate basic games using a single text prompt.

articles.title: Citadel Securities invests $400 million in Crypto.com, valuing exchange at $20 billion
articles.description: The exchange's first institutional funding round values it at $20 billion and will fund expansion into tokenized securities and derivatives.

articles.title: Oil giant BP shutters its corporate venture arm after 20 years
articles.description: BP Ventures is shutting down, ending a nearly 20-year run that was marked by reportedly lackluster returns.

articles.title: Uber 砸 148 億美元收購 foodpanda 母公司，複雜監管審查成變數
articles.description: 外送產業整併潮再起，Uber 16 日宣布以 148 億美元的股權價值計劃收購德商 Delivery Hero […]

articles.title: Newsletter platform Beehiiv now lets subscribers chat with each other, adds AI
articles.description: Beehiiv is launching an AI Copilot to help publishers with user growth and analytics.

articles.title: Bitcoin price dips on US stocks sell-off as Micron losses pass 30%
articles.description: Bitcoin fell 1.5% from local highs amid a reversal in US stocks as markets moved from bullish US inflation cues to retail profit-taking.

articles.title: Ethics in crypto market structure ‘really not our concern,’ says Blockchain Association CEO
articles.description: A former CFTC commissioner urged lawmakers not to “kill all the hard work that we put in the rest of the bill” by making ethics a make-or-break issue on crypto market structure.

articles.title: X cracks down on creators who steal content
articles.description: X will use Grok AI to better detect stolen content, redirect payouts to original creators, and crack down on engagement bait.

articles.title: Stripe’s $53 billion PayPal bid is a high-stakes play to own the future of digital payments
articles.description: If Stripe acquires PayPal, the real prize could be consumer wallets, stablecoin issuance or the infrastructure powering the next generation of digital payments.

articles.title: Morgan Stanley’s E*TRADE launches spot crypto trading through Zero Hash
articles.description: Eligible E*TRADE retail clients can now buy, sell and hold Bitcoin, Ether and Solana through a partnership with crypto infrastructure provider Zero Hash.

articles.title: Tradable’s $1B Stellar deal adds to institutional tokenization boom
articles.description: Tradable will bring up to $1 billion in private credit assets to Stellar, extending the blockchain’s push into institutional finance and tokenized real-world assets.

articles.title: Visa backs Open USD with new stablecoin platform as Circle faces fresh competition
articles.description: Visa launched a stablecoin platform that lets banks and fintechs issue, manage and settle digital dollars through its payments network.

articles.title: AI-powered travel agency Fora hits unicorn status, raises $60M
articles.description: Travel agency Fora announced a $60 million Series D round led by Forerunner and Tactile Ventures, valuing the company at $1 billion.

articles.title: Google’s AI Mode now lets you link and interact with select apps
articles.description: With this new update, Google is expanding AI Mode beyond answering questions and into completing tasks across the apps they use regularly.

articles.title: Google continues its renaming streak by turning NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook
articles.description: Google said users can soon access their notebooks through AI Mode in Search.
